name: EuiRadio
description: Single radio button. Use EuiRadioGroup for a related set.
visualDescription: A circular radio button input (~16px diameter) with a visible ring border. When selected, shows a filled primary-color dot inside the ring. Accompanied by a text label to its right. NOT EuiCheckbox (circular vs square). NOT EuiSwitch (radio is a small circle, switch is a pill-shaped toggle).

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

labelProps.description: Object of props passed to the `label` element
